$comment: Long Beach Island, NJ sources. Two confirmed-working venues to start: Bird & Betty's (Squarespace events collection) and Joe Pop's (Squarespace site but the events page embeds a public Google Calendar — we fetch its iCal feed directly). Remaining venues are platforms our existing adapters don't cleanly handle yet; disabled with notes so the auto-probe system can revisit, and so admins can swap them to manual-oneoff if they want to seed dates by hand.

sources.name: Bird & Betty's
sources.notes: Squarespace site — events collection at /events/ (~58 upcoming). Misses daytime-only events because they don't get posted here. Titles are just band names, so defaultEventType="live-music" categorizes them correctly.

sources.name: Joe Pop's Shore Bar
sources.notes: Squarespace site (joepops.com), but events live in a public Google Calendar embedded on /events. We fetch the calendar's iCal export directly (~200 events). To update the calendar source, see the data-src attribute on Joe Pop's /events page. Titles are band names + Happy Hour slots, so defaultEventType="live-music" categorizes them correctly.

sources.name: Black-Eyed Susan's
sources.notes: Squarespace native Calendar block on /happenings; the events collection backing it lives at /live-music-1/. The /happenings page itself has no JSON feed — find the collection URL via the Squarespace sitemap (look for /<collection-slug>/<year>/<month>/<day>/<event-slug> patterns).

sources.name: The Old Causeway Steak & Oyster House
sources.notes: Squarespace site, but they explicitly don't list upcoming shows on their public pages. No events collection found at any common path. Disable; admin can switch to manual-oneoff if dates appear elsewhere.

sources.name: Surf City Hotel
sources.notes: Static HTML page at /entertainment.html embeds a public Google Calendar. Calendar ID extracted from the embed URL — we fetch the iCal export directly. excludeTitlePatterns drops the daily 'Bistro Open' / 'Open' entries (which are restaurant operating hours, not events). Titles are band names, so defaultEventType="live-music" categorizes them correctly. titleRules pull Trivia out of the live-music bucket.

sources.name: Daddy O LBI
sources.notes: Wix site embedding the Elfsight 'Event Calendar' third-party widget. The widget's boot endpoint returns the full event list as clean JSON (band names, dates, times, images) with no auth needed. Widget ID discovered by loading /happenings in DevTools and watching the network call to core.service.elfsight.com/p/boot.

sources.name: The Sandpaper Events
sources.notes: Local LBI newspaper running WordPress + GeoDirectory plugin. The plugin exposes events at /wp-json/geodir/v2/events (NOT the wp/v2 namespace) with 700+ events including LBI venues, libraries, churches, and town events. Adapter expands recurring_dates into separate event records. Categories on each event (Activities, Music, Theater, Religious Services, Comedy) feed the categorize pipeline.

sources.name: LBI Lowdown
sources.notes: Weekly Beehiiv newsletter ('this week on LBI: M/D/YY'). Adapter finds the most recent /p/this-week-on-lbi-* post via sitemap.xml, then parses Things to Do, Family Fun, AND the Live Music section. Live Music section rows are filtered against skipLiveMusicVenues so we don't double-count venues that have their own direct source (joe-pops, surf-city-hotel, bird-and-bettys, daddy-o, sea-shell-resort, tuckers, black-eyed-susan's, old-causeway). This is how we capture Buckalew's, Black Whale, Hollow Pines, Nardi's, and other Wix-blocked / unscrapeable venues.

sources.name: Southern Ocean County Chamber of Commerce – Events Calendar
sources.notes: Chamber of Commerce community calendar (~123 events: theater, festivals, fundraisers, dance parties, library programs across the entire LBI region). Built on GrowthZone/ChamberMaster — server-renders each event as a schema.org Event microdata card. The /events page on the public site (visitlbiregion.com/events/) is just a hand-curated marketing page; the real calendar lives at business.visitlbiregion.com/community-calendar.

sources.name: The Sea Shell Resort
sources.notes: Beachfront hotel + restaurant in Beach Haven. theseashellresort.com/events embeds a public Google Calendar — we pull the calendar's iCal export directly (~920 events, mostly live music across the Martini Bar, Beach Stage, Tiki Bar, and Fire Pit stages). Titles are band names, so defaultEventType="live-music" categorizes them correctly. Added via /suggest by jeff@adviza.com on 2026-05-26.

sources.name: LBI Manual Recurring
sources.notes: Region-wide bucket for recurring events at LBI venues that aren't on any scrapeable calendar — find them in venue website body text (e.g. 'Every Thursday 10pm-2am from May to September') and add an entry to recurring.json. Seeded with Sea Shell Resort's Thunder Thursday.

sources.name: LBI Manual One-Off
sources.notes: Region-wide bucket for dated one-off events at LBI venues that aren't on any scrapeable calendar — find them in venue website body text and add an entry to one-off.json. Seeded with Sea Shell Resort's Full Moon Party, White Out Party, and Striped Bass Derby.

sources.name: Buckalew's
sources.notes: DISABLED — Wix-hosted site bot-blocks every angle we've tried: direct curl, Anthropic's WebFetch, Wix's own _api/wix-events-* endpoints, AND GitHub Actions' runner IPs all get HTTP 403. Their weekly schedule does appear in the LBI Lowdown's Live Music section, so the cleanest path forward is to extend the beehiiv-lowdown adapter to parse that section (currently skipped). Until then, you can also add Buckalew's shows manually to lbi/recurring.json or lbi/one-off.json.

sources.name: Tuckers Tavern
sources.notes: Restaurant + bar in Beach Haven (101 S West Ave). The /news_events.php page embeds an Elfsight 'Event Calendar' widget — widget ID discovered by inspecting the page HTML. Adapter hits Elfsight's boot endpoint directly (~53 events: weekly specials, live music, holiday events). Added via /suggest by jeff@adviza.com on 2026-05-26.
